title: PotatoWar
description: This is a War and Alliance mod, with potatoes.
body:
![PotatoWar TItle image](https://github.com/TefyerDevs/PotatoWar/blob/main/minecraft_title.png?raw=true)

Potato War is a mod originaly mad by my friend "Mr. Door", But now It has fallen into my hands.
The Mod is about fighting or befriending the potatolings.
And You FIGHT The bosses that we add to the game.
Also we have lore
